eliteOverproduction.metric: Lawyer/pop ratio at historical peak; PhD overproduction 3x 1970 levels

massWellbeing.metric: Real wages flat vs GDP per capita since 1975; life expectancy declining since 2014

politicalPolarization.metric: Congressional bipartisanship at lowest measured level

otherNations.name: China
otherNations.notes: Post-1949 secular cycle maturing. Elite competition intensifying within CCP. Demographics shifting toward stress.

otherNations.name: Russia
otherNations.notes: Post-Soviet secular cycle. High elite competition, wartime fiscal strain, demographic crisis.

otherNations.name: India
otherNations.notes: Young demographic profile delays PSI peak. Rising elite overproduction in IT/professional class.

otherNations.name: European Union
otherNations.notes: Aging demographics, rising populism, fiscal stress in southern members. Institutional trust declining.

otherNations.name: Brazil
otherNations.notes: High inequality, elite fragmentation, institutional polarization. Young population partially buffers.

westernCycle.note: Ibn Khaldun observed ~120-year dynastic cycles in North Africa. Western nation-states may run longer due to institutional complexity, but the pattern of asabiyyah decay is visible.

asabiyyahIndicators.socialCohesion: declining — trust in institutions at historic lows
